remarks: Situated less than a mile from the center of downtown, this beautiful one-bedroom, one-bath apartment puts you at the heart of all the best that Stamford living has to offer. Inside, the amenities are just as appealing, thanks to gorgeous hardwood floors running throughout the spacious and sun-drenched open living and dining area, which offers plenty of room to stretch out. A newly updated kitchen with tile floors and plenty of cabinet and countertop storage space occupies the heart of the floorplan and faces a pair of huge walk-in closets. A large bedroom, meanwhile, sits down the hall and adjacent to the full bathroom. A pair of additional closets flank the main entryway, offering you plenty of overflow storage space. As an added bonus, the building includes a full laundry room in the basement.The commuter-friendly location sits just off Main Street and is walking distance to some of the area's best bars and restaurants, as well as local attractions like Mill River Park. Finally, when you're looking to escape, you're only minutes from I-95 as well as local getaways like Cummings Park and Cove Beach
